name: Cream of Asparagus
recipeInstructions:
1. Break off and discard tough asparagus bottoms.
2. Break off tips; set aside. Coarsely chop stalks.
3. Cook in skillet with onion in butter, salting lightly.
4. When onions are clear (after 8 to 10 minutes), sprinkle with flour.
5. Continue to stir over lowest possible heat for 5 to 8 minutes.
6. Slowly add water or stock, stirring constantly.
7. Cook until thickened, about 8 to 10 minutes, stirring frequently.
8. Cool slightly.
9. In blender, puree sauce bit-by-bit with milk until thoroughly smooth.
10. Return puree to a 3-quart pan (preferably a double boiler).
11. Add dill, salt, pepper, and tamari.
12. Heat gently but do not boil.
13. Cook asparagus tips in boiling water until tender, but still very green, about 2 minutes; drain.
14. Add whole to soup.
